item.title: Local Lab Docker Squid
item.description: My home lab currently runs on a laptop using VirtualBox, with all my VMs configured on a host‑only network so I can take the entire environment with me. The downside is that the VMs’ web services are only reachable from the laptop itself. If I want to work from another workstation and connect over SSH, I lose access to anything the VMs expose—HTTP, management interfaces, and so on. One workaround I explored was running a Docker‑based Squid proxy to bridge that gap
